prompt:
Use uploaded character as exact identity reference.

Reimagine them as a pharmacist in a modern Japanese dispensing pharmacy.

CORE:
Create a humorous but believable anime screencap where the medication counseling perfectly matches the character’s personality, archetype, genre, speech style, powers, worldbuilding, vibe, hidden quirks, emotional tone, and aesthetic identity.

The absurd medicine explanations must feel NATURAL for THIS character specifically.

First internally analyze:
personality, genre, role, energy, speech style, motifs, intelligence style, emotional tone, powers, hidden quirks, whether they are sleepy, smug, saintly, chaotic, elegant, mysterious, villainous, chuuni, shy, cool, etc.

Then generate the most character-accurate absurd medication explanation possible.

Examples:
cat → cat language medicine
chuuni → parallel world stabilizer
angel → divine resonance suppressants
vampire → sunlight tolerance tablets
magical girl → transformation stabilizers
office lady → anti-overtime hallucination pills
idol → crowd charm stabilizer
nun → miracle suppression medicine
yandere → emotional limiter
fox girl → illusion leakage suppressants
cyberpunk → firmware stabilizers
delinquent → battle aura suppressants
sleepy girl → anti-dream-overflow tablets
etc.

Include visible Japanese dialogue:
speech bubbles, medicine labels, prescription bag text, monitor text, sticky notes, subtitles.

NO:
Medication instruction memos,
One-point advice,
large info sheets,
posters,
counter documents.

Dialogue MUST match the character’s speaking style.

Examples:
「副作用は軽微。……たまに時間感覚が崩れるだけ」
「夢のラスボス戦が少し弱くなります〜」
「裏世界側と接続される可能性がある……気をつけろ」
「奇跡酔いを抑えるお薬です」

Environment:
realistic Japanese pharmacy,
medicine shelves,
dosage packaging machine,
medicine boxes,
fluorescent lighting,
pharmacy counter,
waiting chairs,
medicine bags,
monitor display,
natural clutter,
believable depth.

Character actions:
holding medicine,
pointing at pills,
explaining bizarre side effects,
handing over medicine bags,
serious professional attitude despite nonsense explanations.

Patient visible from behind or side.

Speech bubbles:
rounded manga style,
large readable Japanese text,
few lines,
not overcrowded.

Style:
hand-drawn anime illustration,
soft sketch lines,
watercolor paper texture,
visible linework,
warm handmade feeling,
anime screencap energy,
slice-of-life comedy atmosphere,
cinematic composition,
soft indoor lighting
